title: Iran selects ancient port of Siraf for UNESCO World Heritage nomination in 2026
description: TEHRAN – Iran has selected the historical port of Siraf in the southern Bushehr province as its official candidate for UNESCO World Heritage inscription in 2026, a provincial cultural heritage official said on Saturday.

title: Turning dirty fossil fuel into clean energy source
description: Coal gasification aims to cut import dependence as it converts coal into syngas, which is a mixture of carbon monoxide, hydrogen, carbon dioxide and other smaller hydrocarbons. Syngas serves as feedstock for producing synthetic natural gas, methanol, ethanol, ammonia for fertilisers, petrochemicals, and hydrogen

title: Standing Tall: Roman Rider Brings Ancient Stunt — and Family Legacy — to Franklin Rodeo
description: Franklin Rodeo fans will be treated to some of the best rodeo entertainment in the nation. Jessica Blair Fowlkes will Roman ride during all three performances of the rodeo, May 14-16. The cowgirl performs a stunt that goes back to the days of the Roman Empire, when soldiers stood atop a pair of horses, one [...] The post Standing Tall: Roman Rider Brings Ancient Stunt — and Family Legacy — to Franklin Rodeo appeared first on Williamson Source .

title: Ancient Roman Ship Coating Reveals Secrets Hidden for 2,200 Years
description: A new study of a 2,200-year-old Roman shipwreck reveals that ancient sailors used sophisticated organic coatings to waterproof their vessels. Since the earliest seafaring journeys, people have needed ships that could resist saltwater, stay watertight, and endure damage from marine organisms such as worms. Despite this long history, research into non-wood materials used in ship [...]
